job_description:
Sr. B2B Content Specialist

2Base Technologies is at a deliberate stage of building its marketing function, and this role owns the written voice of that function end to end. We are a technology services company with over 15 years of delivery experience, working with mid-market and enterprise clients across the United States and the United Kingdom. Our work spans AI implementation, custom software development, legacy system modernisation, and operational transformation.

What This Role Exists to Do

This role does not invent the voice. It operationalises, applies, and enforces it across all written output: long-form content that earns search traffic, content written in the voice of senior leadership for professional publishing, and the quality standard for everything written that leaves this company.

Audience: Technical leaders and business decision-makers at mid-market companies (CTOs, IT Directors, Founders, COOs, Operations leaders) who evaluate architecture decisions or are accountable for technology outcomes.

What You Will Own

  • All long-form written content: pillar pages, blogs, playbooks, decision frameworks, and use-case libraries targeting senior decision-makers in the US and UK.
  • Written content produced in the voice of senior leadership for professional platforms.
  • The 2Base content voice, including auditing all published content to ensure brand standards.
  • Content briefs written clearly enough for junior team members to produce first drafts without clarification.
  • The content quality gate: nothing is published without passing through this role first.
  • AI tool usage as a productivity layer, not a substitute for thinking.

What You Will Not Own

  • SEO keyword selection (handled by the SEO Specialist).
  • Social media scheduling and publishing (handled by a separate team member).
  • Visual design of content assets (handled by the Visual Designer).
  • Distribution strategy (decided by the Marketing & Growth Lead).
  • ICP definition (you write for the ICP, but do not define it).

Requirements

  • Minimum 3 to 5 years writing B2B content (strong candidates have 5–6 years).
  • Content that ranked on Google, not just published.
  • Experience writing in voices other than your own (executives, founders, senior professionals).
  • Working-level SEO understanding (search intent, writing to intent).
  • Experience with AI writing tools and their limitations.
  • Content that contributed to measurable outcomes (traffic, leads, engagement).
  • Background in technology, SaaS, or professional services preferred.

Writing Ability

  • Writes with a clear point of view, not neutral summaries.
  • Explains complex technical concepts in plain language without losing credibility.
  • Writes concisely with no filler or unnecessary qualification.
  • Adapts to different voices authentically.

Mindset

  • Treats content as a commercial tool, not a creative exercise.
  • Comfortable with feedback and does not treat it as personal criticism.
  • Genuinely curious about AI, technology, and business operations.
  • Fast-paced: the team cannot wait three days for a first draft.

What We Are Not Looking For

  • Portfolios of generic "Top 10 Tips" articles or trend summaries with no original thinking.
  • Writers who cannot explain how their content performed or its contribution.
  • Writers without experience targeting technical or senior business audiences.
  • Writers who only produce self-directed content and lack consistency with briefs.
  • Candidates who cannot write convincingly in a voice other than their own.
  • Candidates who treat AI tools as the primary author with minimal editing.

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: A senior B2B content specialist role at 2Base Technologies, responsible for enforcing the company's written voice across technical and business audiences, ensuring technical credibility and commercial relevance through long-form content and leadership-voice writing.

job_description:
Organic Growth & SEO Specialist

2Base Technologies is building its marketing function from a clear brief, and this role owns the organic search engine that sits at the center of it. We are a technology services company with over 15 years of delivery experience, working with mid-market and enterprise clients across the United States and the United Kingdom. Our work spans AI implementation, custom software development, legacy system modernization, and operational transformation.

What This Role Exists to Do

This role does not optimize content after it is written. It determines what gets written, why, and how it is structured so that the right people find it at the right moment in their decision process. The organic search function at 2Base is being built to generate qualified inbound pipeline from two specific markets, the US and UK, at scale. That means a large volume of high-intent pages, a technical foundation that performs, and a programmatic architecture that compounds over time. The person who fills this role designs that system and owns its results.

What You Will Own

  • The organic traffic strategy for the US and UK markets, including keyword targeting and the full architecture of how search drives inbound pipeline
  • Keyword research and search intent mapping across all service lines and target audiences
  • Page architecture of the website, including what pages exist, what they target, how they are structured, and how they connect through internal linking
  • On-page SEO across all published pages
  • Technical SEO oversight, working directly with the development team on crawlability, indexing, site speed, Core Web Vitals, and structured data
  • Google Search Console as a working instrument, including weekly review, issue resolution, and opportunity identification
  • The programmatic SEO build, including designing the framework and templates that allow the site to scale to 80 to 120+ high-intent pages
  • SEO briefs written clearly enough that the Content Specialist can execute without guessing
  • Link building target approval. The outreach team identifies candidates, and you approve or reject based on defined quality standards
  • SEO performance reporting, including organic traffic, keyword movement, pages published, and Search Console health

What You Will Not Own

  • Writing content: you brief the Content Specialist, you do not write the pages
  • Link building outreach: a dedicated team member executes this, you set the standard
  • Paid search: that is a separate role
  • Social media distribution: separate channel, separate owner
  • Content calendar scheduling: the Marketing & Growth Lead sets distribution priorities

Requirements

  • Minimum 3 to 5 years in an SEO or organic growth role, with strong candidates typically at the 4 to 6-year mark
  • Experience ranking high-intent commercial pages, not just informational content
  • Experience managing technical SEO independently
  • Experience building or contributing to a programmatic SEO architecture
  • Strong working knowledge of Google Search Console as an active tool
  • Experience working across US and/or UK markets
  • Working knowledge of AEO, GEO, and AIO, including structuring content for AI-powered search surfaces
  • Ability to write SEO briefs that a content writer can execute without clarification

Mindset

  • Thinks in systems, not tasks
  • Comfortable with ambiguity in early-stage environments
  • Analytically honest, able to diagnose issues and adjust direction
  • Collaborative but not passive, working closely with content and development teams

What We Are Not Looking For

  • SEO practitioners whose entire experience is informational content
  • Candidates who treat Search Console as a monthly reporting task
  • Candidates who cannot explain high-intent vs. informational keyword targeting
  • Candidates whose SEO process depends entirely on tools
  • Candidates with no exposure to US/UK search behavior

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Strategic SEO role building a scalable organic search engine for US/UK markets. Owns technical architecture, keyword targeting, and high-intent page scaling.

job_description:
About Us

2Base Technologies is a technology services company with over 16 years of delivery experience, primarily serving the United States and the United Kingdom. We are at a deliberate stage of building our marketing function, and this role owns it end to end, including strategy, team, and results.

Role Overview

This is not a role for someone who has contributed to a marketing function. It is for someone who has built one and can demonstrate ownership of lead targets, channel investment decisions, team management, and measurable outcomes.

What You Will Own

  • Qualified lead targets and pipeline contribution from marketing
  • Team direction and weekly priorities
  • Ideal Customer Profile definition and content strategy approval
  • Channel strategy and budget prioritization (inbound/outbound)
  • Budget allocation across channels
  • Marketing analytics and attribution
  • Hiring and building the marketing team
  • Outbound marketing strategy and execution oversight
  • Email nurture strategy
  • Marketing and sales alignment
  • Marketing performance reporting to leadership

What You Will Not Own

  • Writing content, designing assets, or running paid campaigns directly. This is a leadership and ownership role where you set direction, build the team, and are accountable for outcomes.

Requirements

  • Experience: 8-15 years in marketing, with a minimum of 3-4 years in a senior/strategic role. Must have personally owned a lead target, not contributed to one.
  • Experience in technology services, SaaS, or AI companies
  • Managed a small team
  • Ran inbound and outbound marketing simultaneously
  • Set up or improved marketing analytics and attribution
  • Operated in or marketed to US/UK markets (preferred, not optional)
  • Cross-functional collaboration with sales and business development

Education

  • MBA in Marketing, Business Administration, or related field (preferred)
  • Relevant certifications in digital marketing, growth marketing, or analytics (advantageous)

Mindset

  • Outcome-focused, not activity-driven
  • Self-directed with independent prioritization
  • Comfortable making decisions with incomplete information
  • Honest about challenges, avoids upward misrepresentation
  • Understands that team quality determines results

What We Are Not Looking For

  • Candidates who measure success by impressions, follower growth, or content volume without pipeline connection
  • Those who worked in large teams with unclear ownership
  • Individuals who prioritize tools over problem understanding
  • No exposure to US/UK B2B buyers

Benefits

  • Growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

Contact

If this aligns with your career goals, share your resume at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Lead and build 2Base Technologies' marketing function from scratch, focusing on strategy, team ownership, and results in tech services for US/UK markets.

job_description:
Senior Visual Designer at 2Base Technologies

2Base Technologies is building its marketing function from scratch, and this role makes it look like a company worth taking seriously. We are a technology services company with over 15 years of delivery experience, working with mid-market and enterprise clients across the United States and the United Kingdom. Our work spans AI implementation, custom software development, legacy system modernisation, and operational transformation.

What This Role Exists to Do

Before a CTO reads a word of our content, they see the design. Before they trust the argument, they have already made a judgment about whether this company looks credible. This role owns that first impression, and then owns every asset that follows.

The visual function at 2Base is being built from the ground up. There is no brand system to inherit, no template library to use, and no consistent visual identity to maintain. What exists is a clear strategic direction, a defined audience of senior technology and operations leaders, and a marketing team building the content engine around it. Your job is to give that engine a visual identity it deserves.

The first 30 days of this role have one priority: build the brand system. Everything else, including LinkedIn carousels, ad creatives, landing pages, and presentation templates, is built from that foundation. A designer who wants to jump straight into production before the system exists is not the right fit.

This is not a creative agency role. The audience is sceptical, senior, and technically literate. Design that looks clever but reads as unclear, or feels consumer-facing rather than professional, will not work with this ICP. Restraint, precision, and consistency matter more than visual novelty.

What You Will Own

  • The 2Base visual brand system, including colour palette, typography, spacing, layout rules, and the documentation that makes it usable by the whole team
  • All marketing and content visual assets, including LinkedIn carousels, single-image posts, social graphics, infographics, and diagrams
  • Paid advertising creatives, including Google Display and LinkedIn Ads, designed to be tested and iterated
  • Landing page visual design, including layout, components, and conversion-focused structure, handed to the development team for build
  • Email visual templates, presentation templates, and sales deck templates
  • A template library that enables other team members to produce on-brand assets independently
  • Design consistency auditing, including periodic review of all published assets to ensure alignment with the brand system
  • Secondary responsibility: light video editing and motion for social reels, YouTube, and website use, supporting other team members

What You Will Not Own

  • What an asset communicates. The Content and Thought Leadership Specialist owns the message, argument, and information hierarchy. You may suggest improvements in structure, but content decisions remain with them
  • Copywriting. The Content Specialist writes the words; you structure them visually
  • Website development. You design the pages; the development team builds them
  • Content strategy. You execute what is briefed, not decide what gets created
  • Brand positioning. The Marketing Operating System defines how 2Base communicates; you interpret it visually

Requirements

  • Experience: Minimum 3 to 5 years in a B2B design role, preferably in technology, SaaS, or professional services
  • Experience building a brand system or significantly evolving one, not just producing isolated assets
  • Experience designing for LinkedIn, including carousel formats, document posts, and single-image feed content
  • Experience creating paid ad creatives that have been executed, tested, and iterated
  • Experience designing landing pages with an understanding of conversion principles
  • Comfort with basic video editing for social and web content, including reels, short-form YouTube, and simple website assets
  • Proficiency in Figma, which is non-negotiable, and Adobe Creative Suite including Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, and After Effects
  • Design thinking
  • Portfolio demonstrates restraint through clean, structured, and purposeful design
  • Ability to explain the reasoning behind key design decisions
  • Designs with a specific audience in mind, not for general appeal
  • Strong understanding and consistent application of typography as a functional tool
  • Ability to produce work that appears credible to a senior B2B audience at first glance

Mindset

  • Able to work effectively from structured briefs
  • Works at speed without compromising quality
  • Treats design as a communication tool rather than purely creative expression
  • Open to feedback and able to give it constructively

What We Are Not Looking For

  • Portfolios dominated by consumer brands, lifestyle work, event design, or campaigns with no B2B relevance
  • Designers who can describe visuals but cannot justify their decisions
  • Candidates without experience building a brand system
  • Designers who overcomplicate visuals with excessive fonts, colours, styles, or effects
  • Candidates who require complete creative freedom and struggle with structured briefs

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Senior Visual Designer to build brand system and create B2B marketing assets with precision and consistency for senior audiences.

job_description:
Business Development Manager

We are looking for a high-performing and self-driven Business Development Manager to join our team at 2Base Technologies. In this role, you will be responsible for driving revenue growth, building strong client relationships, and expanding our market presence for IT services and digital solutions. This role requires both individual contribution and strategic ownership, including leading sales initiatives, guiding junior team members, and managing key accounts. If you have a passion for technology, consultative selling, and business growth, we’d like to hear from you.

Responsibilities

  • Identify and generate qualified leads through outbound channels, referrals, and market research
  • Drive new business opportunities for web, mobile, and enterprise software development services
  • Own and manage the complete sales cycle from lead generation to closure
  • Develop and execute strategic sales plans to achieve revenue targets
  • Handle key accounts and high-value clients, ensuring long-term relationship building and business growth
  • Identify upsell and cross-sell opportunities within existing accounts
  • Lead client discussions, discovery sessions, and solution presentations
  • Understand client needs and propose tailored IT and digital transformation solutions
  • Collaborate with delivery, design, and marketing teams to create proposals and win deals
  • Ensure alignment between client expectations and internal delivery teams
  • Maintain accurate sales data in CRM tools and provide regular forecasts and reports
  • Ensure consistent follow-ups and pipeline management
  • Represent the company in networking events, client meetings, and industry forums
  • Take ownership of revenue targets and contribute to team-level sales performance
  • Support and guide junior business development executives when required

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree or relevant education/experience
  • 5–10 years of experience in B2B sales within IT services or digital solutions
  • Proven ability to close deals and manage large accounts
  • Strong understanding of software services: web, mobile, SaaS, and enterprise solutions
  • Experience handling international clients
  • Familiarity with CRM tools (Zoho, HubSpot, Salesforce) and outbound tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator
  • Strong communication, presentation, and negotiation skills
  • Ability to work independently while also contributing at a team and strategic level
  • Strong ownership mindset and accountability for targets
  • Ability to think strategically and drive business growth initiatives

Experience and Education

  • 5–10 years of experience in sales/business development
  • Bachelor’s degree / BSc IT / BCA / B-Tech / MBA or equivalent
  • Certifications in sales, marketing, or consulting are a plus

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Seeking a Business Development Manager to drive revenue growth through strategic sales initiatives and client relationship management in IT services and digital solutions.

job_description:
QA Engineer

We are seeking a detail-oriented Associate QA Engineer with 1–3 years of hands-on experience in software testing to join our QA team. In this role, you will ensure the quality and reliability of web and mobile applications by participating in test planning, test case creation, test execution, and defect tracking.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Review BRD, SRS, user stories, and functional specifications to understand system requirements.
  • Translate requirements into structured test scenarios and documented test cases for comprehensive coverage.
  • Perform functional, regression, and exploratory testing across web and mobile platforms.
  • Identify edge cases, alternate flows, and boundary conditions to validate system behavior.
  • Log, document, and track defects with clear reproduction steps and severity classification.
  • Validate bug fixes and perform regression testing during releases.
  • Maintain test documentation, execution reports, and QA artifacts for traceability.
  • Support test summaries, progress updates, and QA reports during development cycles.
  • Collaborate with business analysts, developers, and senior QA engineers to resolve issues.
  • Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies (sprint planning, stand-ups, reviews).
  • Perform basic API validation and data verification for integration-level testing.
  • Own assigned modules/features to ensure testing completeness and release readiness.
  • Contribute to improving test coverage, testing approaches, and QA processes.
  • Validate AI-powered/data-driven features for output accuracy and system behavior.
  • Learn automation fundamentals and emerging QA tools like AI testing practices.

Required Skills & Mindset:

  • Strong attention to detail and structured thinking.
  • Willingness to understand business logic before testing.
  • Ability to identify edge cases and risks beyond happy paths.
  • Analytical mindset to question unexpected system behavior.
  • Clear communication and collaboration skills.
  • Solid documentation for defect reporting and test case writing.
  • Experience with manual testing, test documentation, and defect reporting.
  • Basic exposure to automation and modern QA tools.
  • Familiarity with test case design techniques.
  • Experience with bug tracking and test management tools.
  • Basic API testing knowledge (Postman, REST Assured).
  • Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies and QA’s role in sprints.
  • Familiarity with AI-assisted testing.

Good to Have:

  • Awareness of performance and security testing.
  • Interest in learning automation frameworks (Selenium, Playwright, Cypress).
  • Basic scripting in Python, JavaScript, or Java.
  • Exposure to AI-enabled systems (chatbots, recommendation engines).
  • Awareness of continuous testing in modern pipelines.
  • Experience with mobile testing frameworks (Appium).
  • Risk-based testing prioritization.
  • Commitment to continuous learning and QA tool updates.
  • ISTQB certification or equivalent.

Contact:

For inquiries, email your resume to careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: A detail-oriented QA Engineer with 1–3 years of experience in manual testing, test documentation, and defect tracking to ensure web and mobile application quality.

job_description:
Sr UI/UX Designer

We are seeking a Senior UI/UX Designer to create intuitive, visually engaging, and user-friendly designs for web applications, mobile applications, and digital platforms. The designer will collaborate with Business Analysts, Developers, and Project Stakeholders to translate functional requirements and wireframes into high-quality UI designs and interactive prototypes. The role demands strong design thinking, attention to detail, and the ability to deliver consistent and modern user experiences across platforms.

Key Responsibilities:

  • UI & Experience Design:
  • Design visually appealing and user-friendly interfaces for web and mobile applications.
  • Translate business requirements and BA wireframes into polished UI designs.
  • Ensure consistency in layout, typography, colors, and design patterns across applications.
  • Prototyping & Design Validation:
  • Create interactive prototypes and mockups using Figma or similar tools.
  • Present design concepts to stakeholders and incorporate feedback into improvements.
  • Support teams in visualizing the final user experience before development.
  • Collaboration with Development Teams:
  • Work closely with developers to ensure accurate UI implementation.
  • Provide clear design specifications and assets during handover.
  • Ensure designs are practical and feasible for implementation.
  • Usability & Design Improvements:

  • Contribute ideas to enhance user experience and interface clarity.
  • Design Consistency:
  • Follow established UI standards and design guidelines.
  • Maintain organized design files and documentation for team collaboration.

Requirements:

  • 4–6 years of experience in UI/UX design for web or mobile applications.
  • Strong proficiency in Figma or similar design tools.
  • Experience in UI design, prototyping, and responsive design.
  • Good understanding of user-centered design principles and usability best practices.
  • Experience designing responsive interfaces for desktop and mobile devices.
  • Basic understanding of HTML and CSS concepts.
  • Ability to communicate design ideas clearly with technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  • Strong portfolio demonstrating UI/UX projects across web or mobile applications.

Good to Have:

  • Experience in Agile development environments.
  • Exposure to usability testing or user feedback analysis.
  • Experience working on enterprise applications or digital platforms.

Education:

  • Diploma / Degree in IT, Computer Science, Design, or related field.

Benefits:

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, share your updated resume at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Senior UI/UX Designer creates intuitive designs for web/mobile apps, collaborates with teams, and ensures user-friendly experiences across platforms.

job_description:
Business Analyst

The Business Analyst plays a key role in ensuring requirements are clearly understood, accurately documented, and traceable throughout the software development lifecycle. This role focuses on translating business and functional inputs into structured, standardized documentation that supports effective development, testing, and delivery. Working closely with business analysts, design teams, and technical stakeholders, the role ensures consistency, clarity, and alignment across all requirement artifacts.

Key Responsibilities

  • Create Software Requirement Specifications (SRS) based on inputs from Core Business Analysts, stakeholder discussions, and requirement walkthroughs
  • Prepare Business Requirement Documents (BRD) using approved templates while ensuring business intent and system behavior are clearly documented
  • Participate in requirement discussions to understand business objectives, functional flows, dependencies, and assumptions before documentation
  • Analyze requirements to identify gaps, ambiguities, and inconsistencies, and work with Core BAs to resolve them
  • Document functional flows, business rules, and acceptance criteria where applicable to support development and QA teams
  • Document wireframes, UI flows, validations, and UI specifications in collaboration with design and product teams
  • Maintain change logs, version history, and document updates throughout the project lifecycle
  • Create and manage traceability matrices linking business, functional, and technical requirements
  • Maintain cross-references across BRD, SRS, UI, API, and related documentation
  • Ensure documentation consistency, completeness, and alignment with approved scope and delivery timelines
  • Ensure accurate and timely PMS updates with structured documentation details
  • Support development, QA, UAT, and audit processes through clear, traceable, and up-to-date documentation
  • Assist in requirement reviews, walkthroughs, and validation sessions with internal and client stakeholders

Required Skills and Experience

  • 1 to 3 years of experience in Business Analysis or related roles
  • Strong experience in BRD and SRS creation
  • Hands-on experience with documentation templates, standards, and version control
  • Ability to document UI wireframes and functional flows clearly
  • Working knowledge of APIs and system integrations for documentation purposes
  • Experience with project management systems and documentation tools
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple documents in parallel
  • Excellent written communication and stakeholder coordination skills

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field
  • 1 to 3 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com
summary: The Business Analyst translates business needs into structured documentation, ensuring clarity and traceability across development. Responsibilities include creating SRS/BRD, collaborating with stakeholders, and maintaining documentation consistency.

job_description:
Sr. Software Engineer - Web

Company: 2Base Technologies

Role Overview We are seeking a highly capable Senior Software Engineer – Web to join the engineering team at 2Base Technologies. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and delivering scalable web applications and APIs, while owning modules end-to-end and contributing to system design decisions. You will play a key role in ensuring code quality, driving engineering best practices, and mentoring junior developers. This role requires a strong balance of hands-on coding, technical decision-making, and delivery ownership within a structured project environment.

Key Responsibilities

Application Development & Delivery Ownership

  • Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications and APIs.
  • Own end-to-end delivery of assigned modules and features within sprint/release timelines.
  • Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code aligned with engineering standards.
  • Ensure production readiness including performance, error handling, and reliability.
  • Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve issues across development, QA, and production environments.

System Design & Technical Contribution

  • Design APIs, service structures, and data models for assigned components.
  • Translate business requirements into scalable and modular technical solutions.
  • Evaluate trade-offs such as performance, scalability, and complexity during implementation.
  • Actively contribute to system design discussions with practical insights.

Code Quality & Engineering Practices

  • Build reusable, modular, and testable components.
  • Conduct code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards and best practices.
  • Maintain technical documentation for modules and solutions.
  • Ensure high standards of code quality, performance, and security.

Collaboration & Execution

  • Work closely with project managers, architects, QA engineers, and designers.
  • Participate in sprint planning, estimation, and technical discussions.
  • Provide accurate effort estimates and proactively highlight risks or blockers.
  • Ensure timely delivery aligned with project milestones and quality expectations.

Mentorship & Team Contribution

  • Review code and provide constructive feedback to junior developers.
  • Guide team members on implementation approaches and debugging techniques.
  • Support onboarding and technical ramp-up of new team members.
  • Promote adoption of engineering standards and best practices within the team.

Expected Outcomes - Deliver high-quality, production-ready features with minimal defects. - Demonstrate ownership of modules from design to deployment. - Improve team code quality through reviews and best practices. - Contribute to scalable and maintainable system design. - Support junior developers in improving their technical capabilities.

Requirements - Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field. - 4–8 years of experience in web application development. - Strong experience in both backend and frontend development. - Experience in building scalable web applications and APIs. - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. - Good communication and teamwork abilities.

Technical Skills

Backend Technologies

  • Strong experience in one or more backend technologies: PHP, Python, Node.js, Java, .NET.
  • Experience in building RESTful APIs and backend services.

Frontend Technologies

  • Strong proficiency in JavaScript.
  • Experience with modern frameworks: React, Angular, Vue.js.

Database Technologies

  • Experience working with relational databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL.
  • Familiarity with NoSQL databases: MongoDB.

Cloud & DevOps (Basic Exposure)

  • Basic exposure to cloud platforms: AWS, Azure, or GCP.
  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines.
  • Experience with Docker or container-based deployment is preferred.

Education - B.Tech / BE (Computer Science / IT / EC) - MCA / MSc Computer Science

Benefits - A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

Contact If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: Senior Software Engineer - Web role at 2Base Technologies involves designing scalable web apps, APIs, and mentoring junior developers. Requires 4-8 years of experience in full-stack development with expertise in JavaScript and React.

job_description:
Associate - System Engineer

The Business Analyst plays a key role in ensuring requirements are clearly understood, accurately documented, and traceable throughout the software development lifecycle. This role focuses on translating business and functional inputs into structured, standardized documentation that supports effective development, testing, and delivery. Working closely with business analysts, design teams, and technical stakeholders, the role ensures consistency, clarity, and alignment across all requirement artifacts.

Key Responsibilities

job_description:

We are seeking a Senior DevSecOps Engineer to lead cybersecurity, infrastructure automation, and DevSecOps practices as we transition to a secure, scalable, and modern engineering environment. This role will strengthen 2Base’s security posture, modernize pipelines, and foster a secure-by-design culture. You will collaborate with engineering, product, and leadership teams to ensure systems, applications, and cloud environments are secure, reliable, and future-ready.

job_description:
Sr. Business Analyst

At 2Base, we are rebuilding the Business Analyst function into a world-class, product-minded, clarity-driven team. This role is not a documentation role. It is not a screen updater role. It is not a support role. This is a core Business Analyst position responsible for functional modelling, system reasoning, requirement clarity, and building the foundation for correct development.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead requirement workshops, client calls, and discovery discussions to understand business needs clearly.
  • Ask deeper questions, challenge assumptions, and validate the true business intent behind every requirement.
  • Convert ambiguous client inputs into structured, logical, and actionable functional understanding.
  • Break large features into modules, workflows, components, and clear dependencies.
  • Build strong system-level understanding involving APIs, integrations, data flow, and backend considerations.
  • Translate business processes into functional logic that development teams can execute.
  • Decompose requirements into use-case flows, system behaviours, edge cases, alternate paths, validation rules, and dependencies.
  • Prepare high-quality documentation, including BRD, FRD, SRS, workflows, state diagrams, data-flow diagrams, API requirement specs, and acceptance criteria.
  • Ensure all documentation is clear, logical, structured, testable, and ready for developers and QA to use.
  • Collaborate closely with developers, architects, QA, and product owners to validate feasibility and align understanding.
  • Ensure QA teams can derive test cases effectively from your functional logic and acceptance criteria.
  • Communicate confidently with clients, handle requirement discussions smoothly, and clarify misunderstandings immediately.
  • Push back politely on unclear or changing requirements and ensure final decisions are documented properly.
  • Maintain requirement traceability throughout the lifecycle and ensure zero ambiguity during handover to development.
  • Own the entire requirement lifecycle from discovery to development readiness with high accountability.
  • Drive clarity across teams by ensuring every requirement is complete, validated, and logically consistent.

Required Skills & Experience

  • Minimum 4+ years of core Business Analyst experience with strong analytical and system-level thinking.
  • Ability to break down complex requirements into clear components, workflows, and functional logic.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication with confidence in client interactions and clarifications.
  • Proven experience in preparing SRS, BRD, FRD, workflows, and acceptance criteria with high clarity.
  • Ability to challenge assumptions politely, ask the right questions, and ensure zero ambiguity.
  • Strong collaboration experience with development, QA, architects, and cross-functional teams.
  • Understanding of API behaviours, integrations, data flows, and multi-module system interactions.
  • Ability to run requirement discussions, workshops, and independently lead discovery sessions.
  • Exposure to SaaS, scalable products, automation, or AI-supported systems is an added advantage.
  • Demonstrated ownership of requirements end-to-end, ensuring developer-ready and testable outputs.
  • Not suitable for UI-only thinkers, passive communicators, template-based writers, or those relying on AI for answers.
  • Success is defined by clear, testable requirements, zero rework, strong cross-team alignment, and confident communication.
  • Candidates must align with 2Base’s structured thinking, clarity-driven culture, and transformation of the BA function.

Minimum Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business, or related field
  • 4 to 8 years of experience as a Business Analyst or Product Analyst
  • Experience in SaaS or scalable product environments
  • Exposure to AI/Automation, integrations, or multi-module systems
  • Ability to run independent client workshops
  • Must have independently handled requirement ownership for at least one full project lifecycle

Benefits

  • A growth-driven environment with opportunities to lead, innovate, and upskill continuously.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@2basetechnologies.com.
summary: A Senior Business Analyst role focused on functional modeling, requirement clarity, and system-level analysis to drive aligned development. Requires 4+ years of experience in structured, product-driven BA practices.

job_description:
US Finance Executive

Job Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented Finance & Accounts Senior Executive to manage invoicing, accounts receivable and payable, payroll coordination, financial reporting, and compliance activities for our US and Canada operations. The role involves close coordination with business units, consultants, vendors, and external partners to ensure smooth financial operations and timely reporting.

Preferred Skills

  • Exposure to US / Canada accounting processes (mandatory)
  • Exposure to QuickBooks Online
  • Experience coordinating with international payroll platforms
  • Strong analytical and organizational skills
  • Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines

Key Responsibilities

Revenue & Invoicing

  • Prepare monthly invoice projections and verify new contracts or contract expires.
  • Coordinate with BU Heads to finalize invoice amounts.
  • Prepare and issue invoices through accounting systems.
  • Manage timesheet-based invoicing and project-specific billing.
  • Track change requests (CR) and coordinate invoicing accordingly.

Accounts Receivable & Collections

  • Monitor and follow up on customer receivables.
  • Coordinate with internal teams for overdue invoices and escalations.
  • Track customer payments and update AR reports.

Accounts Payable & Vendor Management

  • Coordinate with vendors for invoice collection and processing.
  • Manage vendor documentation and compliance requirements.
  • Initiate vendor payments after approvals and share remittance details.

Cash Flow & Financial Monitoring

  • Prepare weekly, monthly, quarterly, and annual cash flow reports.
  • Monitor receivables and payables to ensure smooth cash flow.
  • Share financial updates with management.

Payroll Coordination

  • Prepare payroll data for US and Canada operations on a biweekly basis.
  • Coordinate with payroll platforms (Justworks, ADP Canada) for payroll processing.
  • Maintain consultant payroll sheets and support payroll accounting entries.

Financial Reporting & Analysis

  • Prepare monthly financial reports including P&L and variance analysis.
  • Maintain dashboards related to services, staffing, and operational metrics.
  • Support budgeting and revenue projections.

Compliance & Audit Support

  • Support year-end compliance activities including 1099 and W-2 filings.
  • Coordinate with auditors for US and Canada audit requirements.
  • Assist in preparing audit schedules, asset schedules, and year-end adjustments.

Banking & Reconciliation

  • Perform bank, credit card, and LOC reconciliations.
  • Track daily bank balances and prepare bank reports.

Operational & Administrative Support

  • Assist with consultant onboarding and offboarding processes.
  • Coordinate insurance renewals and employee benefit plans.
  • Prepare ad-hoc financial and management reports as required.

Required Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Commerce / Accounting / Finance
  • 2–5 years of experience in finance and accounting operations
  • Strong understanding of AR, AP, payroll, and financial reporting
  • Experience working with accounting systems such as QuickBooks or similar
  • Good knowledge of Excel and financial data analysis

Key Competencies

  • Financial accuracy and attention to detail
  • Strong communication and coordination skills
  • Problem-solving and analytical thinking
  • Ability to work with cross-functional teams

Contact: For inquiries, please reach out to naseeba.parvin@nuvento.com.
summary: Senior Finance Executive for US/Canada operations managing invoicing, AR/AP, payroll, and reporting. Requires 2-5 years of finance experience and QuickBooks proficiency.

job_description:
Senior TechOps Engineer

Experience: 4+ Years | Location: Kochi

What we’re looking for

Join us to help design, operate, and continuously improve the Cloud Infrastructure that powers our digital products and services. We’re looking for a Senior TechOps Engineer who combines strong Cloud and Infrastructure expertise with a proactive approach to automation, reliability, and operational excellence. In this role, you will work closely with architects, developers, and delivery teams to build and maintain scalable environments that support high-performing applications.

Responsibilities

  • Design, build, and maintain cloud-based environments across development, staging, and production using AWS, Azure, or GCP.
  • Set up and manage highly available, scalable, and secure server infrastructures following industry best practices.
  • Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines to automate build, test, and deployment workflows.
  • Implement and manage Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools such as Terraform, CloudFormation, or ARM templates.
  • Monitor system health and performance, proactively identifying risks and bottlenecks before they impact production.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve production incidents, ensuring minimal downtime and optimal system reliability.
  • Collaborate with development and architecture teams to optimize application performance, scalability, and cost efficiency.
  • Implement automation tools and operational practices to improve deployment speed, consistency, and efficiency.
  • Enforce security best practices, including firewall rules, VPN access, secrets management, and data protection.
  • Maintain clear and up-to-date documentation for system configurations, processes, and troubleshooting procedures.
  • Communicate effectively with cross-functional teams and stakeholders, providing operational insights and technical support.
  • Demonstrate strong process discipline, ownership, and accountability in day-to-day infrastructure and operational management.

Qualifications

  • At least 4 years of experience in a TechOps, DevOps, or Infrastructure Engineering role.
  • Hands-on experience with Cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform.
  • Solid understanding of Cloud architecture concepts, including virtualization, orchestration, scalability, and availability.
  • Strong experience with Docker and container-based application deployment.
  • Working knowledge of web servers such as Apache and Nginx.
  • Experience with DNS management, networking fundamentals, and cloud networking concepts.
  • Familiarity with PostgreSQL, MySQL, or similar relational databases.
  • Proficiency in scripting languages such as Bash, Python, or equivalent.
  • Experience working with firewalls, VPNs, and infrastructure-level security controls.
  • Good understanding of security trends, vulnerabilities, and operational best practices.
  • Proficiency with version control systems such as Git, Bitbucket, or AWS CodeCommit.
  • Experience setting up and managing monitoring and alerting tools.

Bonus Points

  • Experience with Kubernetes and Helm charts.
  • Knowledge of Cloud networking, load balancing, and traffic management.
  • Exposure to Cloud-native application architectures and platform reliability practices.
  • Experience working in fast-paced product or digital delivery teams.

Benefits

  • Hybrid WFH policy
  • Health insurance
  • Employee Well-being & Assistance Program
  • 40+ Paid Off days
  • Year-end leave encashment

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@whiterabbit.group.

  • Familiarity with infrastructure provisioning concepts (Terraform/CloudFormation is a plus).

Monitoring and Logging Tools

  • Knowledge of CloudWatch Logs, Loki, Splunk for log analysis.
  • Familiarity with Prometheus and Grafana for metrics monitoring and dashboarding.
  • Understanding of alerting systems (Alertmanager) and incident response workflows.
  • Ability to analyze logs and metrics to identify system issues.

Networking and Security

  • Strong understanding of load balancers (e.g., ALB, NLB) for distributing traffic and troubleshooting connectivity issues.
  • Knowledge in API Gateways like AWS API Gateway or NGINX for managing API traffic.
  • Knowledge of reverse proxies and ingress controllers (e.g., NGINX Ingress, Traefik) for managing internal/external traffic.
  • Understanding service-to-service communications, including DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, and gRPC protocols.
  • Experience or hands-on knowledge with firewalls, security groups, and IAM roles for secure communications.
  • Troubleshooting skills for VM-related issues in platforms like AWS EC2 or equivalent.

DevOps Toolchains

  • Proficiency with Docker for managing container images and runtime debugging.
  • Strong understanding of Kubernetes concepts of managing deployments, ingress setups, and pod-related issues and related troubleshooting commands and mechanisms.
  • Knowledge of CI/CD pipeline building tools such as Jenkins, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD for building, deploying, and managing automated pipelines.
  • Understanding of Ingress controllers (e.g., NGINX, Traefik) and SSL termination for secure routing.

Troubleshooting and Incident Management

  • Strong problem-solving skills to identify root causes using logs, metrics, and system-level debugging.
  • Ability to document detailed troubleshooting steps and solutions for recurring issues.

Collaboration and Communication

  • Ability working with cross-functional teams (DevOps, development, and operations) to resolve incidents.
  • Skills in effective and proactive communication to escalate issues and provide updates during shift handovers.
  • Proficiency with tools like Slack, JIRA, Confluence, or Google Workspace for collaboration and issue tracking.
summary: Junior DevOps Engineer with 0.5-3 years experience. Focus on cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and collaboration in Trivandrum.

Experienced AI / ML Engineer

Closing Date: 25 May 2026 Job Published: 10 April 2026 Contact Email: careers@reizend.ai Location: Trivandrum Work Mode: Work From Office Salary: 5-9 LPA

Brief Description

We are seeking an experienced AI Engineer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in designing, deploying, and maintaining advanced AI/ML models with expertise in Natural Language Processing (NLP), Computer Vision, and architectures like Transformers and Diffusion Models. You will play a key role in developing AI-powered solutions, optimizing performance, and deploying and managing models in production environments.

Key Responsibilities

  1. AI Model Development and Optimization:
  2. Design, train, and fine-tune AI models for NLP, Computer Vision, and other domains using frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch.
  3. Work on advanced architectures, including Transformer-based models (e.g., BERT, GPT, T5) for NLP tasks and CNN-based models (e.g., YOLO, VGG, ResNet) for Computer Vision applications.
  4. Utilize techniques like PEFT (Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning) and SFT (Supervised Fine-Tuning) to optimize models for specific tasks.
  5. Build and train RLHF (Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback) and RL-based models to align AI behavior with real-world objectives.

  6. Explore multimodal AI solutions combining text, vision, and audio using generative deep learning architectures.

  7. Natural Language Processing (NLP):

  8. Develop and deploy NLP solutions, including language models, text generation, sentiment analysis, and text-to-speech systems.

  9. Leverage advanced Transformer architectures (e.g., BERT, GPT, T5) for NLP tasks.

  10. AI Model Deployment and Frameworks:

  11. Deploy AI models using frameworks like VLLM, Docker, and MLFlow in production-grade environments.

  12. Create robust data pipelines for training, testing, and inference workflows. Implement CI/CD pipelines for seamless integration and deployment of AI solutions.

  13. Production Environment Management:

  14. Deploy, monitor, and manage AI models in production, ensuring performance, reliability, and scalability.

  15. Set up monitoring systems using Prometheus to track metrics like latency, throughput, and model drift.

  16. Data Engineering and Pipelines:

  17. Design and implement efficient data pipelines for preprocessing, cleaning, and transformation of large datasets.

  18. Integrate with cloud-based data storage and retrieval systems for seamless AI workflows.

  19. Performance Monitoring and Optimization:

  20. Optimize AI model performance through hyperparameter tuning and algorithmic improvements.

  21. Monitor performance using tools like Prometheus, tracking key metrics (e.g., latency, accuracy, model drift, error rates).

  22. Solution Design and Architecture:

  23. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into scalable, efficient AI/ML solutions.
  24. Design end-to-end AI systems, including data pipelines, model training workflows, and deployment architectures, ensuring alignment with business objectives and technical constraints.

  25. Conduct feasibility studies and proof-of-concepts (PoCs) for emerging technologies to evaluate their applicability to specific use cases.

  26. Stakeholder Engagement:

  27. Act as the technical point of contact for AI/ML projects, managing expectations and aligning deliverables with timelines.
  28. Participate in workshops, demos, and client discussions to showcase AI capabilities and align solutions with client needs.

Preferred Skills

  • Proficient in Python, with strong knowledge of libraries like NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, and Matplotlib for data manipulation and visualization.
  • Expertise in TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, and Keras for building, training, and optimizing machine learning and deep learning models.
  • Hands-on experience with Transformer libraries like Hugging Face Transformers, OpenAI APIs, and LangChain for NLP tasks.
  • Practical knowledge of CNN architectures (e.g., YOLO, ResNet, VGG) and Vision Transformers (ViT) for Computer Vision applications.
  • Proficiency in developing and deploying Diffusion Models like Stable Diffusion, SDX, and other generative AI frameworks.
  • Experience with RLHF (Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback) and reinforcement learning algorithms for optimizing AI behaviors.
  • Proficiency with Docker and Kubernetes for containerization and orchestration of AI workflows.
  • Hands-on experience with MLOps tools such as MLFlow for model tracking and CI/CD integration in AI pipelines.
  • Expertise in setting up monitoring tools like Prometheus and Grafana to track model performance, latency, throughput, and drift.
  • Knowledge of performance optimization techniques, such as quantization, pruning, and knowledge distillation, to improve model efficiency.
  • Experience in building data pipelines for preprocessing, cleaning, and transforming large datasets using tools like Apache Airflow, Luigi.
  • Familiarity with cloud-based storage systems (e.g., AWS S3, Google BigQuery) for efficient data handling in AI workflows.
  • Strong understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) for deploying and scaling AI solutions.
  • Knowledge of advanced search technologies such as Elasticsearch for indexing and querying large datasets.
  • Familiarity with edge deployment frameworks and optimization for resource-constrained environments.

Job Description: Security Engineering Leader (US)

Company: Reflections Info Systems (P) Ltd Location: Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India Contact Email: Careers@reflectionsinfos.com Closing Date: 17, Apr 2026 Job Published: 10, Apr 2026

Overview

We are seeking a 12+ years experienced Security Engineering Leader to drive enterprise security initiatives across DLP, PAM, password management, penetration testing, and access governance.

Key Responsibilities

Security Project Delivery

  • Own the full lifecycle of enterprise security projects (charter, plan, execute, measure, close).
  • Lead simultaneous workstreams in DLP, PAM, password management, pentesting, and access reviews.
  • Establish governance cadences, status reporting, RAID logs, and steering-committee presentations.
  • Drive outcomes through matrixed teams, ensuring accountability across stakeholders.

Data Loss Prevention (DLP)

  • Architect and deploy DLP policies across endpoints, email, cloud (M365/Purview), and network egress.
  • Define data classification schemas with Legal/Compliance/business leaders.
  • Tune DLP rules to reduce false positives while protecting PII, client data, and proprietary info.
  • Establish incident response workflows and executive reporting metrics.

Privileged Access Management (PAM)

  • Lead enterprise PAM platform rollout (e.g., CyberArk, BeyondTrust) and governance.
  • Define vaulting, session-recording, and just-in-time access policies for hybrid infrastructure.
  • Drive adoption with Infrastructure/Cloud/application teams.
  • Close coverage gaps via structured roadmap initiatives.

Password Management

  • Design enterprise password strategies for workforce and privileged accounts (e.g., 1Password, Bitwarden).
  • Integrate tools with SSO, MFA, and identity governance platforms.
  • Embed credential security into onboarding/offboarding workflows.

Penetration Testing & Vulnerability Management

  • Manage pentesting programs (vendor selection, scheduling, remediation tracking).
  • Coordinate red-team/purple-team exercises and validate remediation closure.
  • Produce executive-grade summaries for CISO, CTO, and board audiences.

Access Reviews & Identity Governance

  • Operationalize continuous access reviews for AD, Entra ID, and SaaS apps.
  • Automate workflows with IGA platforms (e.g., SailPoint, Saviynt).
  • Enforce RBAC/least-privilege principles with HR/Compliance/application owners.
  • Support audits (SOX, PCAOB) with evidence packages.

Stakeholder Engagement

  • Serve as security liaison to business-unit leaders, framing initiatives as business enablers.
  • Present program status and risk posture to C-suite and board stakeholders.
  • Collaborate with Legal, Compliance, HR, and Finance to align with regulatory obligations.

Preferred Skills

  • 12+ years cybersecurity experience, 5+ years in senior engineering/security lead roles.
  • Proven delivery of large-scale security projects on time and within budget.
  • Deep expertise in DLP, PAM, password management, pentesting, or access governance.
  • Experience in professional/financial services or regulated enterprises (5,000+ employees).
  • Ability to influence cross-functional teams without direct authority.

Technical Proficiencies

  • DLP: Microsoft Purview, Symantec DLP, Forcepoint.
  • PAM: CyberArk, BeyondTrust, Delinea/Thycotic.
  • Identity & IGA: Entra ID, SailPoint, Saviynt, Okta.
  • Pentesting/Vulnerability Management: Rapid7, Tenable, NodeZero, Cobalt.
  • Microsoft 365/Azure Security Stack: Defender for Endpoint, Purview, Conditional Access.
  • Scripting: PowerShell, Python for security automation.

Certifications

  • Strongly preferred: CISSP, CISM, CRISC.
  • Preferred: CEH, OSCP, Microsoft Security (SC-100, SC-200, SC-300), PMP.
  • Education: Bachelor’s in Computer Science/Information Security; advanced degree a plus.

Application Instructions

  • Email resumes to Careers@reflectionsinfos.com with notice period, current/expected CTC.
  • Fraud Alert: No payment is ever requested for jobs at Reflections. All communications are via official website, LinkedIn, or HR email.
  • Contact Careers@reflectionsinfos.com for clarification.
summary: Security Engineering Leader with 12+ years experience leading DLP, PAM, and access governance projects, driving cross-functional security initiatives.

Brief Description

The Technical Engineering Manager provides hands-on technical leadership, line management, and delivery oversight for a single team. Reporting to an Engineering Manager (EM), this role is responsible for the performance and technical excellence of an engineering team that is becoming increasingly more AI-augmented. You will work with the EM to lead the transition, ensuring the team leverages AI agents to maximize productivity while maintaining the highest standards of architectural integrity, security, and code quality.

Key Responsibilities

1. Technical Anchor

  • Hands-on Technical Leadership: Lead from the front by remaining deeply hands-on with the codebase, tackling complex technical challenges while establishing high standards and best practices.
  • Architectural Integrity: Own team-level architecture, ensuring solutions are scalable, maintainable, and align with global engineering standards.
  • Practical AI Application: Maintain a strong understanding of AI tools/workflows to improve efficiency. Guide the team in practical AI adoption where it adds clear value.

2. Line Management & People Development

  • Mentorship & Coaching: Provide direct line management to engineers, focusing on professional growth, technical hurdles, and career milestones.
  • High-Performance Culture: Foster a high-trust, accountable environment via regular 1-on-1s, Skills Matrices, and high-potential talent identification.
  • Recruitment: Lead technical interviews to attract top-tier engineering talent.

3. Product & Portfolio Alignment

  • Roadmap Execution: Translate high-level product roadmaps into actionable technical plans with Product Managers.
  • Continuous Improvement: Use data to improve workflows and quality, identifying bottlenecks and implementing solutions.
  • Resource Optimization: Manage capacity and technical resourcing to meet delivery commitments without compromising code health.

Preferred Skills

  • Experience: Minimum 5 years in software industry with 1+ year leading teams of 5+ engineers.
  • Architectural Stewardship: Strong ability to design scalable systems and enforce global engineering standards.
  • Analytical Mindset: Proficiency in using data to improve workflows and quality.
  • AI Literacy and Application: Understanding of AI tools to enhance productivity and quality.
  • Communication: Bridge technical execution and product roadmaps effectively.

Application Instructions

PIT Solutions (P) Ltd

Address: Module No. 209-N, 9th Floor, Yamuna, SEZ IT Building, Technopark Phase III, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India - 695583 Website: http://www.pitsolutions.com Closing Date: 30, Apr 2026 Job Published: 08, Apr 2026 Contact Email: careers@pitsolutions.com

Brief Description

Experience: 3-6+ Years

Required Skills

  • Quality Control & Audit Expertise
  • Regulatory Compliance Knowledge (US Mortgage)
  • Loan File Review & Validation
  • Attention to Detail
  • Risk Assessment & Mitigation
  • Knowledge of QC Tools & LOS Systems
  • Data Analysis & Reporting
  • Policy Interpretation & Implementation
  • Issue Tracking & Escalation Management
  • Communication & Training Support
  • Defect Feedback & Root Cause Analysis (RCA)

Job Description

We are seeking a detail-oriented QC & Compliance Analyst to ensure accuracy, quality, and regulatory compliance across end-to-end loan and mortgage operations. This role is responsible for performing quality reviews, identifying compliance gaps, supporting audits, and working closely with operations teams to improve process adherence, risk mitigation, and overall loan quality across the loan lifecycle.

Key Responsibilities

Quality Control & Compliance Reviews - Perform comprehensive quality checks and compliance reviews across the loan lifecycle, including pre-funding and post-funding stages. - Review loan files, documentation, and system data to ensure compliance with internal policies, SOPs, regulatory requirements, and investor guidelines. - Identify defects, compliance gaps, documentation errors, and process deviations; recommend corrective and preventive actions (CAPA).

Audit & Risk Management - Conduct pre-funding and post-funding audits, as applicable. - Support internal, external, and client audits by preparing audit documentation, responses, and reports. - Ensure timely closure of audit observations, findings, and compliance issues in coordination with operations and management teams. - Identify trends, root causes, and risk patterns to support proactive risk mitigation.

Reporting & MIS - Track QC findings, defect trends, and compliance metrics. - Prepare and publish MIS, dashboards, and quality reports for management review. - Maintain audit logs, trackers, and documentation to support governance and compliance requirements.

Process Improvement & Stakeholder Collaboration - Work closely with loan processing, underwriting, closing, and servicing teams to improve quality, accuracy, turnaround time, and SLA adherence. - Provide feedback, guidance, and clarifications to operational teams on compliance and documentation standards. - Support process improvement initiatives to strengthen control frameworks and reduce defect rates.

Preferred Skills

  • 3–6 years of experience in loan or mortgage QC, compliance, or audit roles.
  • Strong understanding of end-to-end loan lifecycle processes, including origination, underwriting, closing, post-closing, and servicing.
  • Hands-on experience in document review, compliance audits, and reporting.
  • Good knowledge of regulatory, investor, and internal compliance guidelines.
  • Strong analytical skills with high attention to detail.
  • Proficiency in MS Excel and reporting tools.
  • Effective written and verbal communication skills.
  • Ability to collaborate with multiple stakeholders and work independently in a deadline-driven environment.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in US mortgage QC and compliance.
  • Exposure to default servicing, foreclosure audits, or risk reviews.
  • Familiarity with audit methodologies, CAPA tracking, and risk assessment frameworks.
summary: The QC & Compliance Analyst ensures loan operations' accuracy and compliance through audits, reviews, and process improvements. Responsibilities include identifying compliance gaps, supporting audits, and enhancing loan quality and risk mitigation.

PIT Solutions (P) Ltd

Module No. 209-N, 9th Floor, Yamuna, SEZ IT Building, Technopark Phase III, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India - 695583 Website: http://www.pitsolutions.com Contact Email: careers@pitsolutions.com

Underwriter (US & UK Mortgage) - Junior & Senior

Closing Date: 30, Apr 2026 Job Published: 08, Apr 2026

Brief Description

Experience Required: 3-6+ Years

Required Skills

  • Credit Risk Assessment
  • Income & Asset Analysis
  • Debt-to-Income (DTI) & Loan-to-Value (LTV) Analysis
  • Automated Underwriting Systems (AUS)
  • Regulatory & Compliance Knowledge
  • Attention to Detail
  • Risk Mitigation & Decision Making
  • Conditioning & Documentation Review
  • Communication & Stakeholder Coordination
  • Cross-Market Mortgage Knowledge (US & UK)

Job Description

We are seeking an experienced U.S. Mortgage Underwriter to perform end-to-end underwriting activities across the mortgage lifecycle. The role involves:

Underwriting & Credit Decisioning - Review and analyze mortgage loan applications for eligibility, accuracy, and regulatory compliance. - Evaluate borrower creditworthiness, income, assets, liabilities, collateral, and Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratios. - Perform comprehensive underwriting analysis and make independent decisions on loan acceptance, conditions, or decline based on risk assessment. - Provide final underwriting approval on mortgage loans in line with delegated authority.

Loan Lifecycle Support - Perform underwriting analysis across the loan lifecycle, including: - Loan origination support - Underwriting coordination and review - Document verification and validation - Loan closing and post-closing activities - Ensure loan files are complete, accurate, and ready for closing within defined SLAs.

Compliance, Risk & Quality - Ensure all loans meet investor, regulatory, QC, and compliance guidelines (FHA, FNMA, FHLMC, VA, as applicable). - Identify discrepancies, conditions, and potential risk factors; clearly document and communicate findings to relevant teams. - Maintain accurate underwriting notes, checklists, and audit-ready documentation.

Escrow, Title & Servicing Support - Review escrow and title documents to ensure accuracy and compliance with underwriting requirements. - Support loan boarding and servicing by validating approved loan data. - Assist with default and foreclosure support by reviewing loan documents and underwriting decisions, as required.

Collaboration & Systems - Collaborate with processing, closing, QC, and servicing teams to resolve escalations and complex underwriting scenarios. - Manage loan files and underwriting workflows using Encompass and other Loan Origination Systems (LOS).
summary: Underwrite US & UK mortgages by analyzing credit risk, ensuring compliance, and making loan decisions. Collaborate with teams to maintain quality and regulatory standards.
